rulings.Case Title: DIANA HINES et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion To Compel Lennar Communities Development, Inc. To Produce Custodian(S) Of Records And Person(S) Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And Responsive Documents
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, September 29, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel Lennar Communities Development, Inc. to produce custodian(s) of records and person(s) most knowledgeable for deposition and responsive documents is continued to October 11, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 503 = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD THEODORE LUKA VS. AC AND S, INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Protective Order Regarding Plaintiff'S Special Interrogatories (Set Two)
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, September 29, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant The Toro Company¿s motion for protective order regarding plaintiff¿s special interrogatories set two is continued to November 1, 2011 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 503 per defendant¿s amended notice filed on September 9. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND BARRAGAN VS. THOMAS DEE ENGINEERING COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Raymond Barragan¿S Further Responses To Its Requests For Admissions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, September 29, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Defendant Rockwell Automation, Inc.¿s motion to compel plaintiff¿s further responses to its requests for admissions is granted. Plaintiffs have twenty days to file supplemental responses. The court¿s position on the matters at issue in this motion has been fully explained at the recent hearings involving the same counsel in the Metcalf case. If any party contests the tentative ruling, the hearing will be at 8:30am on September 30, in Department 220, not at 9am on September 29. Any party wishing to contest the tentative ruling must notify the court with a copy to opposing counsel by 4:30pm on September 29 by email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org. = (220/HEK)
